net_reduction_definition: net reduction (production size at be4b7b1 minus the projected integrated PR B tree) at least 1,400 lines against the 3,704-line deletion baseline (shell_scanner.py 3,031 plus direct_marker_scanner.py 673)
owned_surface_definition: owned surface (full successor-owned files, changed symbols in shared modules, and all schema, build, and packaging logic) at most 2,200 production lines
ratification: ratified by the owner on 2026-07-22 at checkpoint review, after three adversarial review rounds; this review-approved amendment commit is the ratification revision
